response.justification: Strong individual contributor with deep technical breadth and a clear bent for testing, tooling, and developer education, but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience, no mobile-platform background, and no track record running a developer-productivity org — all central requirements for this Level II Manager role.
strengths: 13+ years of software development with hands-on dev-tooling work (CI/CD, test runners, Selenium courses, MCP code generators).
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts).
Solid software-craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, testable architectures.
concerns: No people-management experience listed; all roles are IC (Staff/Senior Developer), missing the 2-year management minimum.
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling at scale); brief iOS/tvOS work in 2015 is not comparable.
No evidence of organizational roadmap ownership, performance management, or leading org-wide change.
